if.err.wrap.description: Wrap the error with context using %w.

if.err.nil.description: Return zero value and the error.

if.err.nil.wrap.description: Return zero value and a wrapped error.

if.err.fatal.description: Log the error and exit. For main/setup code only.

err.assign.description: Call returning (value, error) with an inline error check.

if.err.inline.description: Scope the error to the if statement for error-only calls.

errors.is.description: Branch when err matches a sentinel error anywhere in its chain.

errors.as.description: Branch when err's chain contains a specific error type, binding it.

err.sentinel.description: Package-level sentinel error for errors.Is comparisons.

defer.close.description: Defer closing a resource right after the error check.

for.range.description: Range over a slice, map, or channel.
